$comment: DCAT harvest feeds — read by scripts/generate-dcat.ts (runs on predev/prebuild). Configured by /portaljs-add-dcat. `profiles` selects which application profiles to emit (dcat-2, dcat-3, dcat-ap, dcat-us, or a national profile id like dcat-ap-se/ch/de — register more via registerDcatProfile). `serializations` picks the RDF formats. The rest is the catalog-level org/contact metadata DCAT-AP and DCAT-US require: fill `publisher` and `contactPoint` before claiming conformance (the generator warns which mandatory fields are still missing). DCAT-US requires an IRI-identified publisher: set `publisher.uri` (or `publisher.homepage`, used as the fallback @id) or the publisher is rejected as a blank node.
title: Data catalog
description: DCAT catalog of datasets in this portal.
